location: Found in a chest in Crumbling Farum Azula, guarded by a Banished Knight.

source.name: Chest guarded by Banished Knight, Crumbling Farum Azula

tactics: From the Dragon Temple Rooftop grace, drop down past the area where the Ancient Dragon roams and work down through the floating rock platforms toward a building to the southeast.
Pass through the building, climb the ladder outside, and head to the east edge of that upper area — the chest sits there, guarded by a Banished Knight.
Banished Knights are tough sword-and-shield fighters with parry-punishing combos; fight them in open space rather than on the narrow ledges around the chest.
lore: A heavy tower shield engraved with a dragon as a symbol of protection, harking back to the age before the Erdtree when the great dragons themselves served as living ramparts for their lieges.

builds.name: Balanced elemental Strength tank
builds.why: Solid all-round elemental guard alongside full physical block makes it a dependable choice for the elementally varied fights inside Crumbling Farum Azula and beyond.
